data.title: Altcoin ETFs break outflows as Ether stabilizes and XRP gains traction, smaller funds struggle for momentum.
data.description: There is a divergence in flows of Altcoin ETFs, with Ether stabilizing while XRP is experiencing steady demand. Smaller funds are observing uneven traction in the market.

data.title: NetDragon to invest in Open-Q Education Ecosystem tokens to promote global education equity. Hong Kong, Dec. 23, 2025.
data.description: Hong Kong, December 23, 2025 - NetDragon Websoft Holdings Limited, a prominent figure in internet community development (Hong Kong Stock Code: 777), has revealed intentions to invest in AI technology. This investment aims to foster a globally co-created and shared network.

data.title: Predicting $1.86-$1.92 recovery for DOT within a week, based on MACD momentum and RSI oversold conditions.
data.description: According to a recent price prediction, there is a forecast for the DOT cryptocurrency to potentially recover to a range of $1.86 to $1.92 by December 30, 2025. This optimism is fueled by the bullish MACD momentum and oversold RSI conditions, indicating a possible bounce from the $1.76 lows.
